caption: A computer screen displays a terminal environment with multiple open windows and panels, showing lines of code and system logs. The interface includes a sidebar on the left with various commands, such as "kubectl create -f .fluent-bit-configmap.yaml" and "kubectl create -f .fluent-bit-ds-minikube.yaml". The main window displays a sequence of log entries under the header "mg'tail route observer /path/runner/log.dag". Legible text in the logs includes "node: 122", "level:info", and "celestiamanager_manager-0". The scene remains static across the frames, with the same lines of code and log output visible throughout. The overall appearance is that of a technical debugging or monitoring session within a Kubernetes or containerized environment, characterized by a dark background with light-colored text in various shades of white, green, and yellow.
